title: Randomly get jumpscared by my dog
description: Adds a 1/10000 (By default) chance every tick for a image of my dog to jumpscare you.
body:
Every player tick, a random number between 1 and whatever the jumpscareChance gamerule is (by default 10000) and if that number is one, a GUI containing only a image of my dog (Luna) will appear and a bark sound will play. You must press escape to get rid of her temporarily. Inspired by the Terraria mod [1/10000 Chance for Withered Foxy Jumpscare Every Second](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3481943642)

Also, I have a feedback form now! Check it out [here](https://forms.gle/yoqKg2okEsmqeWFx6)!
